name: build_check
description: Run build/vet/test for Go (multi-target, --clean-testcache, --build-and-run), Rust/Cargo, TypeScript (tsc/ts), Python (syntax check), and bandit security linting on multiple targets.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before checking

parameters.name: --tags=TAGS
parameters.description: Go build tags or Rust features

parameters.name: --python
parameters.description: Python syntax check on one or more files

parameters.name: --bandit-format=FORMAT
parameters.description: Bandit output format: custom, json, or txt

parameters.name: --rust
parameters.description: Rust/Cargo check; supports --head/--tail to truncate output

parameters.name: --go
parameters.description: Explicitly select Go mode for the given targets

parameters.name: --build-and-run
parameters.description: Build a Go binary from first target, run it with remaining targets as args

parameters.name: --clean-testcache
parameters.description: Run go clean -testcache before tests (Go only, forces recompilation)

parameters.name: --head=N
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Show only last N lines of output

examples.expected: Syntax-checks all three Python files in /app and reports OK/FAILED per file, saving 2 steps

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses N separate syntax/build/vet/test/bandit calls into 1 step; --clean-testcache eliminates separate go clean -testcache step; --build-and-run collapses go build+execute; --dir eliminates separate cd step.
